message.content:
@startuml
participant "client" as C1
participant "gateway" as G1
participant "developer-service" as D1
participant "devs-db" as DB1
participant "broker" as B1
participant "planning-service" as P1
participant "planning-db" as DB2

participant "client" as C2
participant "gateway" as G2
participant "developer-service" as D2
participant "devs-db" as DB2
participant "broker" as B2
participant "planning-service" as P2
participant "planning-db" as DB3

C1 ..> G1 : POST dev
G1 ..> D1 : POST dev
D1 ..> DB1 : persist
D1 ..> G1 : response 201
G1 ..> C1 : 201

C2 ..> G2 : POST dev
G2 ..> D2 : POST dev
D2 ..> DB2 : persist
D2 ..> G2 : response 201
G2 ..> C2 : 201

D1 ..> B1 : emit DevCreated Event
B1 ..> P1 : consume Event
P1 ..> DB2 : persist Dev

@enduml
